code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line_opt = io.read_line()
  let line = match line_opt
  when Some(l)
    l
  when None
    ""
  end

  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)

  mut best_val = 0
  mut best_abs = 0
  mut found = false
  mut i = 0

  while i < tokens.len()
    let tok_opt = tokens.get(i)
    match tok_opt
    when Some(tok)
      let n_opt = string.parse_int(tok)
      match n_opt
      when Some(n)
        let abs_n = if n < 0
          -n
        else
          n
        end
        if not found
          best_val = n
          best_abs = abs_n
          found = true
        else
          if abs_n < best_abs
            best_val = n
            best_abs = abs_n
          end
        end
      when None
        i = i
      end
    when None
      i = i
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  print("min_abs=#{best_val}")
  Ok(())
end
